'''Devers''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as an officer in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], having achieved the rank of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]].

==Biography==
He was the tactical officer stationed aboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']], under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nammo]] while the warship was on the run from the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. Specifically, the vessel was being hunted by Admiral [[Garreth Holtz]].

[[Olin Garn]], in order to recruit [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] into the Alliance as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], had to first get approval from Devers about the young man. The commander later participated in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], again serving as tactical officer.
